scripts.dev:web:clean: cd apps/web && rm -rf .next && npx next dev
scripts.migrate:check: cd scripts && python -c "from dotenv import load_dotenv; from pathlib import Path; import os; load_dotenv(Path(__file__).parent.parent / 'apps' / 'api' / '.env'); print('DATABASE_URL:', os.getenv('DATABASE_URL', 'NOT SET')[:50] + '...' if os.getenv('DATABASE_URL') else 'NOT SET')"
scripts.deploy:api: echo 'Deploy to Railway: Connect GitHub repo and set env vars'
scripts.deploy:web: echo 'Deploy to Netlify: Connect GitHub repo and set build command'
